//: Class descriptors for libhub.so. Scoped to the chip classes on the
U4025QW path: Rts5409s_ISP (primary chip ISP — what our
(sibling, secondary chip uses it on some configs), Rts5409s_IIC_ISP
and FL5500_IIC_API (panel scaler i2c access — backs the panel-id VCP read).
PS5512_IIC_ISP, PS5512_ISP — these are for chips on other monitor

classes.name: IIC_INTF
classes.//: Same descriptor + slot 0xf8 = read_seq_hw (seen in FL5500_IIC_API::read_byte).

0xa0.name: update_self
0xa0.//: (IIC_INTF*, PROG_CFG const*) -> u32. Called by Rts5409s_ISP::isp
as the per-component program function with the staged firmware blob.

0xf8.name: read_seq_hw
0xf8.//: Different variant from read_seq. Used by FL5500_IIC_API::read_byte
as (read_seq_hw)(iic, slave, reg, count=2, out, max=1).

classes.name: FL5500_IIC_API
classes.//: Faraday-Linear FL5500 panel-scaler i2c API. Constructor pattern not
explicitly logged here, but read_byte/write_byte at libhub.c:61223+
show the access pattern: i2c_slave at +0x00 (`*this` -> u8), IIC_INTF*
at +0x08 (`*(long**)(this+8)`). Methods include the SPI flash helpers
(write_spi_sector, sram_to_spi_flash, enable_spi_master, etc.) — this
is the class that drives the panel-scaler ISP from the i2c side, used
for the VCP 0xEE panel-id read.

fields.name: i2c_slave
fields.//: 8-bit slave address. For U4025QW panel scaler = 0x94.

fields.name: iic
fields.//: Transport — all i2c calls dispatch through here.

classes.name: Rts5409s_ISP
classes.//: RealTek RTS5409S USB-hub MCU ISP driver — the class our plugin's
rts540x_arm/stage handlers model after (the c8-stage protocol).
Holds an IIC_INTF* at +0x70 + std::string at +0x38 (with SSO buffer
at +0x48) + std::vector header at +0x20..0x30 + ModuleMessage* at +0x78.
Constructor at libhub.c:49005 sets vftable, i2c_speed=1 at +0x10,
sets flags &0xc0|0x10 at +0x1c, zeros +0x68/+0x6c, zeros 16-byte blocks

fields.name: _ctor_constant
fields.//: Constructor copies DAT_0029b3a8 here — TBD what it is (initial region

fields.name: flags
fields.//: (checked in isp() to pick open_pid vs open_path).

fields.name: fw_data_begin
fields.//: std::vector<unsigned char> begin pointer (firmware blob from load()).

fields.name: device_path_data
fields.//: std::string SSO data pointer (points to inline buffer at +0x48 by default).

fields.name: prog_cfg_lo
fields.//: First 8 bytes of the PROG_CFG passed to IIC_INTF::update_self.

fields.name: flags2
fields.//: Bit 5 (0x20) checked in isp() — likely a `using_verify_command_only`/

classes.name: Rts5418e_ISP
classes.//: RealTek RTS5418E sibling class. Identical layout pattern to
Rts5409s_ISP; same constructor template. Per the plugin's handler
table comment at fu-dell-monitor-rt-device.c:3597, RTS5418E is the
same chip-class family that handles c8 RAM stage. Field set
matches Rts5409s_ISP — we copy the descriptor.

classes.name: Rts5409s_IIC_ISP
classes.//: i2c-only sibling of Rts5409s_ISP. Same layout — this is what
fu_dell_monitor_rt_proto_dsmcu_* models after (the downstream-MCU
i2c-tunnel RAM loader path).

classes.name: FL5500_IIC_ISP
classes.//: FL5500 panel scaler ISP — wraps FL5500_IIC_API. Same ISP pattern as
Rts5409s_ISP but for a different chip. Constructor pattern not yet
verified — fields below are speculative based on the family template.
Iterate if decomp still shows this+N refs.
